---
title: "The Rev. Charles Shipley"
---

## The Rev. Charles Shipley

**Dates:** (1783-1834)

### Description

Rector of Mappowder

### Biography

He was deprived of an All Souls fellowship in 1810 accused of indecent assault on a boy, and served as Rector of Mappowder, Dorset, from 1814, see Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 73 for his friendship with FMY and WCY [ODNB]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
